name: Red Flannel Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beets in a saucepan and cover with cold, unsalted water. Slowly heat to boiling. Reduce heat and simmer until barely tender, about 35 minutes. Drain under cold water. Remove skins, cube, and add to a large bowl.
2. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water for 10 minutes. Drain. Cool slightly, cube, and add to the beets.
3. Add corned beef, carrots, green pepper, onion, garlic, and parsley. Mix well.
4. Melt butter in an oven-proof skillet (10-inch). Press mixture into the skillet and cook, uncovered, for 6 minutes.
5. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, hot pepper sauce, tomato juice, salt, and pepper to taste. Cook without stirring, 30 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Using two large spatulas, flip the mixture over and place the skillet in the oven. Bake until the potatoes are brown and tender, about 30 minutes.
8. Top with poached eggs. Serves 4 to 6.
